mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, IF(c.reviewCount > 0, ROUND(c.totalRating / c.reviewCount, 1), 0) AS extra__avgRating, IFNULL(booked.cnt, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(IFNULL(seats.total, 0), 0) AS extra__bookingRate FROM concert c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.concertId, COUNT(r.id) AS cnt FROM `schedule` s LEFT JOIN reservation r ON r.scheduleId = s.id AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY s.concertId ) booked ON booked.concertId = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT concertId, SUM(totalSeats) AS total FROM `schedule` GROUP BY concertId ) seats ON seats.concertId = c.id
AND c.status = #{status} AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY
c.viewCount DESC extra__avgRating DESC extra__bookingRate DESC c.startDate ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO concert (title, posterImg, startDate, endDate, bookingStartAt, body, status, regDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{title}, #{posterImg}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{bookingStartAt}, #{body}, IFNULL(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE concert SET title = #{title}, posterImg = #{posterImg}, startDate = #{startDate}, endDate = #{endDate}, bookingStartAt= #{bookingStartAt}, body = #{body}, updateDate = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(s.totalSeats), 0) AS totalSeats, IFNULL(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS reservedCount, IFNULL(SUM(r.paidPrice), 0) AS revenue FROM `schedule` s LEFT JOIN reservation r ON s.id = r.scheduleId AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE s.concertId = #{concertId}
mapper.update: UPDATE concert SET viewCount = viewCount + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
